seoTitle: Summer Island vs Summerland Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Summer Island and Summerland Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Summer Island vs Summerland Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Summer Island and Summerland Point.
heading: Summer Island vs Summerland Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Summer Island, New South Wales and Summerland Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Summer Island has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Summerland Point (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Summer Island or Summerland Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Summer Island has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Summerland Point scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Summer Island scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Summerland Point scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Summer Island or Summerland Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Summer Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
